flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Siskiyous rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at College of the Siskiyous vs the 2004–2008 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Siskiyous fell 12% between 2007 and 2010 (26.1% → 22.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of the Siskiyous fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.2% → 0.0%).
